title: Run extensibility and portability hardening loop
summary: Performs the second required validation loop focused on pack portability, extensibility, and surrounding contract cleanup.
scope_items: Run the second post-implementation validation pass with pack portability and extensibility checks.
Fix adjacent pack-contract, template, docs, workflow, and fixture issues and record the slice in a bounded commit.
done_when_items: The second cleanup loop lands at least one bounded commit with real fixes.
Pack copy-out and second-pack assumptions are revalidated after the fixes.
